title: asyneuma rigidum subsp. aurasiacum
intro: Asyneuma rigidum subsp. aurasiacum, also known as the Auran Asyneuma, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Spain and France, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Auran Asyneuma include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Auran Asyneuma are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
